description: Remote rocky island with unique culture, accessible by ferry from Copenhagen or Yoldia terminal

destinations.name: Rønne
destinations.shortDesc: Main town and port on western coast
destinations.drivingRoute: Yoldia ferry terminal (45min from Copenhagen via E47/A6), then ferry 2h 15min

destinations.name: Hasle
destinations.shortDesc: Artistic fishing village with galleries and harbor

destinations.name: Svaneke
destinations.shortDesc: Charming artist village with cobblestone streets and shops

destinations.name: Gudhjem
destinations.shortDesc: Scenic harbor village on eastern coast with fresh herring

destinations.name: Nexø
destinations.shortDesc: Southern port town with fishing heritage

destinations.name: Hammershus Castle Ruins
destinations.shortDesc: Medieval castle ruins on dramatic cliffs
destinations.drivingTime: 45 min to ferry + 2h 15 min ferry + 20 min on island
destinations.drivingRoute: Yoldia ferry terminal, then drive north on island

destinations.name: Østerlars Rundkirke
destinations.drivingTime: 45 min to ferry + 2h 15 min ferry + 30 min on island
destinations.drivingRoute: Yoldia ferry terminal, then central island

destinations.name: Lindholm Beach
destinations.drivingTime: 45 min to ferry + 2h 15 min ferry + 20 min on island
destinations.drivingRoute: Yoldia ferry terminal, then east coast

destinations.name: Dueodden Beach
destinations.shortDesc: Southern white sand beach with dunes
destinations.drivingTime: 45 min to ferry + 2h 15 min ferry + 30 min on island

destinations.name: Balka Beach
destinations.drivingTime: 45 min to ferry + 2h 15 min ferry + 25 min on island

destinations.name: Almindingen Forest
destinations.shortDesc: Central forest with trails and peaceful walks
destinations.drivingTime: 45 min to ferry + 2h 15 min ferry + 20 min on island
destinations.drivingRoute: Yoldia ferry terminal, then central island

destinations.name: Tejn
destinations.shortDesc: Small village with herb garden and artisan shops
destinations.drivingTime: 45 min to ferry + 2h 15 min ferry + 25 min on island
destinations.drivingRoute: Yoldia ferry terminal, then central island
